label: alkaliphilic
definition: A pH growth preference in which an organism grows optimally at pH values above 9.
comment: ✅ FOUND: Primary label is "alkaphilic" with exact synonyms: alkaliphile, alkaliphilic, alkalophile, alkalophilic. This gap was a false positive - the term exists but with non-standard spelling in primary label.

label: has growth organic acid observation
definition: An observation about whether an organism can grow in the presence of a specified concentration of an organic acid.
comment: Predicate for growth with organic acids like sodium lactate. Similar to has growth NaCl observation (2000508)

label: non-pigmented
definition: A phenotype where cells or colonies lack visible pigmentation.
